title: Tailscale Up: The Official GTC Pregame
location: San Pedro Square Market, 87 N San Pedro St
description: The official GTC pregame party hosted by Tailscale at San Pedro Square Market.

title: Infrastructure Security Lounge @ GTC
location: The Continental Bar Lounge & Patio, 349 S 1st St
description: A daytime open lounge for infrastructure and security professionals. Drop in for conversations about securing AI workloads and GPU infrastructure.

title: Multimodal AI Happy Hour
description: Happy hour for builders working on multimodal AI — computer vision, robotics, spatial computing, and more. Hosted by Rerun.

title: GTC 2026 Kickoff Happy Hour
description: Kick off GTC week with drinks and networking. Hosted by Protopia AI, Cognizant, and Persistent Systems.

title: Anyscale Happy Hour
description: Happy hour hosted by Anyscale, the company behind Ray — the open-source framework for scaling AI workloads.

title: Giga Energy Power Hour
description: Networking happy hour hosted by Giga Energy, focused on the intersection of energy and AI compute.

title: GTC Founders & Builders Evening
description: Evening gathering for AI founders and builders. Hosted by BrevAI.

title: Pre-GTC Cocktail Hour
location: SP2 Communal Bar + Restaurant, 72 N Almaden Ave
description: Cocktails and conversations at SP2 before GTC kicks into full gear. Hosted by Render.

title: Fly.io Happy Hour
description: Happy hour hosted by Fly.io at Alma Tequileria in downtown San Jose.

title: Teeing Up the Next Generation of AI Agents
description: Join ElevenLabs and Google Cloud at Topgolf San Jose for an evening of networking, games, food, and drinks. Connect with leaders building the next generation of AI agents.

title: Exclusive Networking Event
location: JOEY Valley Fair, 2855 Stevens Creek Blvd Suite 1840, Santa Clara (Level 2 Rooftop Lounge Garden)
description: Private rooftop networking event for GPU infrastructure and multi-tenant Kubernetes professionals. No slides, no panels — just focused dialogue about the future of GPU infrastructure. 73+ attendees.

title: Frontier Room: GTC After Dark Cocktail Experience for AI Founders
description: Invite-only cocktail experience for AI founders. Complimentary food & drinks, curated guest list, no slides. Capacity limited. 350 GPU hour raffle to end the night. GTC conference pass not required.

title: Agents After Hours
description: After a long day at GTC, join AI leaders and builders for an evening of relaxed conversations and cocktails. Focused on the AI agents ecosystem.

title: A Night Cap in the Jungle: GTC After Dark
description: GTC after-dark event at Selva with a jungle-themed atmosphere. Hosted by DigitalOcean and Twingate.

title: Full Stack AI Developer Meetup
description: The premier developer meetup at GTC. Hosted by CoreWeave, W&B, Anyscale, Marimo, OpenPipe, and Monolith. Connect with full-stack AI developers pushing the boundaries of model training, inference, and deployment.

title: Deep Lake @ GTC - Dinner at Mastro's
description: Intimate dinner at Mastro's Steakhouse hosted by Activeloop. Discuss data infrastructure for AI.

title: Data Infra for Embodied AI Happy Hour
description: For builders of embodied AI, robotics, world models, and real-world data systems. Schedule: 7:30 PM doors, 8:00–8:30 PM intros & Q&A, 8:30–10:30 PM open networking. Hosts include Oceanveo (real-world data for embodied AI), Neural Motion (cross-embodiment data layer), and Alchedata (agentic multimodal data pipelines).

title: Low Latency, High Spirits
location: The Continental Bar Lounge & Patio, 349 S 1st St
description: Happy hour hosted by Crusoe, NVIDIA, Supermicro, and Hexaware. Drinks, networking, and conversations about AI infrastructure at The Continental.

title: Securely Operationalizing AI: MGT SLED Breakfast Briefing
description: Breakfast briefing focused on securely operationalizing AI for state, local, and education (SLED) organizations. Hosted by MGT, Protopia AI, and HPE.

title: Infrastructure Security Lounge @ GTC
location: The Continental Bar Lounge & Patio, 349 S 1st St
description: Day 2 of the open infrastructure security lounge. Drop by for conversations about securing AI workloads and GPU infrastructure.

title: NVIDIA GTC 2026: AI Builders Happy Hour
description: Happy hour bringing together AI builders from the GTC community. Hosted by Arize AI, CrewAI, SambaNova, and Snowflake.

title: Lightning AI Happy Hour
description: Happy hour hosted by Lightning AI. Retro arcade games, free food and drinks, no-slides networking. Connect with the team behind PyTorch Lightning and the Lightning AI platform.

title: Giga Energy Power Hour
description: Day 2 networking happy hour hosted by Giga Energy, focused on the intersection of energy and AI compute.

title: Inference Happy Hour for AI Founders & Builders
description: For AI founders pushing model limits. Topics: inference performance, efficiency, and scale. Evening dinner & drinks with curated guest list. No slides. Hosts: Massed Compute (frontier AI cloud, 70% savings vs hyperscalers), Rapt AI (Model-Defined GPU optimization, 7-12× more models at target latency), Qwerky AI (4× LLM speed, 75% cost reduction), Amaara Networks (systems integrator), Modular (high-performance AI inference on Mojo). 350 GPU hour raffle. 330+ going.

title: NVIDIA GTC After Hours
description: After-hours networking event hosted by Rafay and Visionbay.ai. 73 attendees. Focus on AI infrastructure and deployment.

title: Open Compute Evening
description: Cap off Day 3 at GTC with Fluence. Talks, discussions, and networking party at 55 South. Schedule: 5:00 PM doors, 6:00 PM start, 6:30 PM talks & discussion, 7:00 PM networking party. Free $100 compute credits for attendees. Focus on cost-efficient GPU compute sourcing and next-gen AI infrastructure. 230+ going.

title: Protopia AI and aion Happy Hour at Dr. Funk(e)
location: Dr. Funk(e), 29 N San Pedro St
description: Happy hour at the vibrant Dr. Funk(e) cocktail bar. Hosted by Protopia AI and aion.

title: NVIDIA GTC: AI Builders Party
description: AI Builders Party hosted by Workato, Union.AI, and DigitalOcean. Networking for AI practitioners and builders.

title: Inference & Evals: AI After Hours
description: Invite-only evening for teams running AI in production. No panels. No pitches. Good drinks and great conversations. Hosted by Braintrust, AWS, and Baseten. Event is full — waitlist available. 196+ going.

title: ⛳ The 19th Hole @ GTC
description: Mini golf, drinks, and networking at Urban Putt. Hosted by PlanetScale and Cloudflare.

title: AI Executive Salon: A Cocktail Party
location: Loft Bar & Bistro, 90 S Second St
description: Cocktail party for AI executives at Loft Bar & Bistro. Hosted by Mirantis, Netris, and SaturnCloud.

title: Scientific Computing Recap Happy Hour
description: Recap happy hour at Hop and Vine for attendees and peers leveraging advanced computing tools — from supercomputing architectures to quantum algorithms. Focus on simulation and optimization across biology, chemistry, physics, and finance. Hosted by Iff Technologies, a quantum bioinformatics company developing tools for drug development.

title: Private Suite: San Jose Sharks vs. Buffalo Sabres
location: SAP Center, 525 W Santa Clara St
description: Watch the San Jose Sharks take on the Buffalo Sabres from a private suite at SAP Center. Invite-only, email amy@protopia.ai to RSVP.

title: Private Dinner at NVIDIA GTC 2026
description: VIP private dinner at Mastro's Steakhouse. Hosted by Vultr, Baseten, and NetApp.

title: Boson x Eigen AI: Higgs Audio Hackathon
location: Circuit Launch, 599 Fairchild Dr, Mountain View
description: Build with Boson AI's Higgs Audio models and Eigen AI's foundation models. Teams of 2-4 push the limits of audio AI. Friday 6PM through Sunday 5PM with presentations and awards. Prizes: NVIDIA 5070Ti, Jetson Orin Nano, Eigen AI credits, swag. Free food for the entire event including pub night on Sunday. The only rule: Higgs Audio must be a core component of your stack.
